name: pos-restaurant
description: Web-based POS System for Restaurant — backend Express + Prisma + MySQL, frontend React + Vite

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.db:fresh: cd backend && npm run db:fresh && npm run db:seed
